description: Minutes is an open-source local conversation-memory tool that records and transcribes meetings, voice memos, and dictation to structured markdown on the user’s own disk. It provides local agent access to that meeting corpus through an MCP server and command-line tooling.
summary: useminutes.app exposes a public local-first MCP server package (`npx minutes-mcp`) and a public CLI (`minutes` via Homebrew or Cargo); no hosted HTTP, GraphQL, or authenticated developer API surface was documented on the domain.
